title: Unlock Resource Location
description: This mod expands Minecraft's ResourceLocation character limits to include more diverse characters in resource packs, enhancing naming flexibility.
body: This mod is specifically designed to enhance the flexibility of naming conventions in Minecraft by overcoming the limitations imposed by the original ResourceLocation system. By allowing a broader range of characters beyond the traditional a-z, 0-9, _, -, and /, this modification opens up new possibilities for organizing and accessing assets within resource packs, enabling more descriptive and diverse naming schemes that can better reflect the content or function of the resources they represent.
